note: standard rent reminder with due date and amount

message.subject: Rent payment reminder for June
message.body_text:
Hello,

Your June rent payment of $1,850.00 is due by 06/05/2026. Please pay online through the resident portal.

Parkview Residences

note: late notice with two obligation amounts and one deadline

message.subject: Past due: June rent
message.body_text: Our records show your rent of $2,100 remains unpaid. A late fee of $75 will be applied if payment is not received by June 10, 2026. Please submit payment through the portal to avoid additional charges.

note: lease renewal notice with two true deadlines

message.subject: Your lease is expiring soon
message.body_text: Your lease at 4521 Maplewood Drive expires on August 31, 2026. Per your lease agreement, you must provide written notice by July 1, 2026 if you do not plan to renew.

note: rent increase notice: effective date plus opt-in deadline, old and new amounts

message.subject: Notice of rent adjustment
message.body_text: Effective September 1, 2026, your monthly rent will increase from $1,850 to $1,925. No action is needed if you wish to continue month-to-month. To lock in a 12-month renewal rate, sign the renewal addendum by July 15, 2026.

message.subject: Upcoming maintenance visit
message.body_text: A maintenance technician will visit your unit on 06/18/2026 between 9 AM and noon for the annual HVAC inspection. Please confirm this appointment by replying to this email or call our office at 555-0142.

note: in-category negative: completed refund, no obligation

message.subject: Security deposit refunded
message.body_text: Your security deposit of $1,200.00 has been refunded in full to the bank account on file. No further action is required. Thank you for renting with us.

note: move-out inspection with multiple explicit actions

message.subject: Move-out inspection scheduled
message.body_text: Your move-out inspection is set for July 30, 2026 at 10 AM. Please complete the cleaning checklist before the inspection and respond to this email to confirm the time.

note: HOA dues with slash date and amount

message.subject: Quarterly HOA dues
message.body_text: Quarterly HOA dues of $340 are due on 07/01/2026. Pay online at the association portal or send a check to the management office.

note: attachment carries the same deadline and a fee; dedupe across body and attachment

message.subject: Sublease addendum for your unit
message.body_text: Attached is the sublease addendum for your unit. Review and sign the addendum, then upload the signed copy to the resident portal by June 25, 2026.
attachment_texts: Sublease Addendum: This addendum must be executed no later than June 25, 2026. A processing fee of $150 applies upon approval.

note: utility pass-through bill; payment obligation implied, no explicit action verb

message.subject: Water and sewer charges for May
message.body_text: Your water and sewer utility bill for May totals $68.45, due with your June rent on 06/05/2026.

note: past event date should not become a deadline; email action is real

message.subject: Courtesy notice
message.body_text: We received a noise complaint regarding your unit on June 2, 2026. This is a courtesy notice and no fine has been assessed. If you have questions, email our office.

note: autopay enrollment: future auto-draft amount is a true obligation amount; no specific date, no explicit action

message.subject: Autopay enrollment confirmed
message.body_text: Your autopay is set up successfully. Your rent of $1,850.00 will be drafted automatically on the 1st of each month. No action needed.

note: clean negative: urgent-sounding notice with no date, amount, or listed verb

message.subject: Emergency water shutoff today
message.body_text: Emergency water shutoff in your building today from 1 PM to 4 PM while we repair a main line. No action required. We apologize for the inconvenience.

note: relative deadline (within 10 days) and a verb outside the action lexicon (contact)

message.subject: Lease violation notice
message.body_text: Per Section 8 of your lease, unauthorized pets must be removed within 10 days of this notice. Failure to comply may result in termination of your lease. Contact our office to schedule a compliance review.

note: expired past date is not a deadline; relative deadline and potential fee are real

message.subject: Renters insurance requirement
message.body_text: Reminder: your lease requires active renters insurance. Our records show your policy expired on 05/31/2026. Upload proof of a new policy within 14 days to avoid a $25 monthly non-compliance fee.

note: ISO date format in a rent due notice

message.subject: RENT DUE NOTICE
message.body_text: RENT DUE NOTICE: Balance of $1,975.00 must be received by 2026-07-01. Pay through the portal or call 555-0188 to make a phone payment.
